raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I made a purchase for a treatment from XXXX using my Citibank credit card, which at the time ended in XXXX ( I have since replaced the card, and the new number ends in XXXX ). The product turned out to be significantly unsatisfactory and did not live up to its advertisements. 

I reached out to XXXX regarding this issue, and on XX/XX/XXXX, they agreed to issue a full refund, as confirmed by an email attachment. 

Unfortunately, XXXX filed for bankruptcy shortly thereafter, leaving me unable to contact them regarding the refund. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, I approached Citibank to dispute the charge and submitted all required documentation. Initially, a Citibank representative informed me that a message had been sent to the merchant, and if there was no response within 45 days, I would automatically receive a full refund via a chargeback. However, three months have passed, and I have not yet received the refund. Despite multiple follow-ups with Citibank, I've been given different reasons for the delay each time, further postponing the resolution. 

I request that Citibank issue the chargeback immediately and settle the dispute. 

The case number for dispute i have with Citi is XXXX.
